info.title: Wallet JSON-RPC User API
info.description: An OpenRPC specification for the user to interact with the Wallet Gateway.

methods.name: addNetwork
methods.description: Adds a new network configuration (similar to EIP-3085).

methods.name: removeNetwork
methods.description: Removes a new network configuration (similar to EIP-3085).

methods.name: listNetworks
methods.description: Lists configured networks without sensitive authentication details.

methods.name: getNetwork
methods.description: Returns full network configuration including auth details. Admin only.

methods.name: selfSignedAccessToken

clientId.title: clientId
clientId.description: Client ID used as the JWT subject

methods.description: Mints a self-signed access token using server-side network credentials. Used for login on self-signed networks.

methods.name: addIdp
methods.description: Adds a new identity provider.

methods.name: removeIdp
methods.description: Removes an identity provider. Fails if an existing network is using the identity provider.

methods.name: createWallet

primary.title: primary
primary.description: Set as primary wallet for dApp usage.

partyHint.title: partyHint
partyHint.description: The party hint and name of the wallet.

signingProviderId.title: signingProviderId
signingProviderId.description: The signing provider ID the wallet corresponds to.

methods.description: Creates a new wallet and party with the given hint.

methods.name: allocatePartyForWallet

partyId.title: partyId
partyId.description: The party ID of the initialized wallet to allocate.

wallet.description: The allocated wallet, or the wallet with status 'removed' if the external signing transaction failed or was rejected.

methods.description: Allocates a party for an already initialized wallet if external signing is complete.

methods.name: setPrimaryWallet

partyId.title: partyId
partyId.description: The party id of the wallet to set as primary.

methods.description: Sets the specified wallet as the primary wallet for dApp usage.

methods.name: removeWallet

partyId.title: partyId
partyId.description: The party id of the wallet to be removed.

methods.description: Removes a party with the given hint.

methods.name: listWallets

filter.title: WalletFilter
filter.description: Filter for the wallets to be returned.

schema.title: ListWalletsResult
schema.description: An array of wallets that match the filter criteria.

methods.description: Lists wallets.

methods.name: syncWallets

schema.title: SyncWalletsResult

added.title: SyncWalletsResultAdded
added.description: Non-disabled wallets added in this syncWallets call.

updated.title: SyncWalletsResultUpdated
updated.description: Existing wallets that either got downgraded to status initialized or their rights changed in this syncWallets call.

disabled.title: SyncWalletsResultDisabled
disabled.description: Either wallets added in this iteration that are disabled, or existing wallet that were updated to be disabled in this syncWallets call.

schema.description: Added, updated  and disabled wallets as a result of the sync.

methods.description: Synchronizes wallets with the connected network.

methods.name: isWalletSyncNeeded

walletSyncNeeded.title: walletSyncNeeded
walletSyncNeeded.description: Whether wallet sync is needed. Returns true if there are disabled wallets or parties on the ledger that aren't in the store.

methods.description: Checks if wallet sync is needed (disabled wallets or new parties on ledger).

methods.name: sign
methods.description: Signs the provided data with the private key of the specified or active party.

methods.name: signMessage

partyId.title: partyId
partyId.description: Party that should sign the message. If omitted, the primary wallet is used.

signature.title: signature
signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over the message.

publicKey.title: publicKey
publicKey.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 public key of the wallet that produced the signature.

methods.description: Signs an arbitrary UTF-8 message with the wallet's private key (Ed25519). The message bytes are signed as-is; callers are expected to embed any application-level domain separation (e.g. EIP-4361 / SIWX text) in the message itself. Only supported for WALLET_KERNEL wallets.

methods.name: getMessageToSign
methods.description: Gets a pending message signing request.

methods.name: deleteMessageToSign
methods.description: Rejects a pending message signing request.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Executes a signed transaction.

methods.name: addSession
methods.description: Adds a network session.

methods.name: removeSession
methods.description: Removes the current network session.

methods.name: deleteTransaction
methods.description: Deletes a pending transaction. Only transactions with status 'pending' can be deleted.

methods.name: getUser
methods.description: Returns information about the current user, including whether they are an admin.

userId.title: userIdentifier
userId.description: The unique identifier of the current user.

isAdmin.title: isAdminFlag
isAdmin.description: Whether the current user is an admin.

methods.name: generateApiKey
methods.description: Generates a new API key for the current user and network.

name.title: name
name.description: A name to identify the API key.

methods.name: listApiKeys
methods.description: Lists all API keys for the current user and network.

methods.name: removeApiKey
methods.description: Removes an API key for the current user and network.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the API key.

Null.title: Null
Null.description: Represents a null value, used in responses where no data is returned.

PublicNetwork.title: PublicNetwork
PublicNetwork.description: Network metadata exposed by listNetworks without sensitive auth configuration

authMethod.title: authMethod
authMethod.description: Authentication method configured for this network

clientId.title: clientId
clientId.description: OAuth or self-signed client ID used for user login

scope.title: scope
scope.description: OAuth scope used for user login

audience.title: audience
audience.description: OAuth audience used for user login

configUrl.title: configUrl
configUrl.description: The configuration URL for the identity provider.

Auth.title: auth
Auth.description: Represents the type of auth for a specified network

primary.title: primary
primary.description: Set as primary wallet for dApp usage.

partyId.title: partyId
partyId.description: The party ID corresponding to the wallet.

hint.title: hint
hint.description: The party hint and name of the wallet.

publicKey.title: publicKey
publicKey.description: The public key of the party.

networkId.title: networkId
networkId.description: The network ID the wallet corresponds to.

signingProviderId.title: signingProviderId
signingProviderId.description: The signing provider ID the wallet corresponds to.

externalTxId.title: externalTxId
externalTxId.description: Unique identifier of the signed transaction given by the Signing Provider. This may not be the same as the internal txId given by the Wallet Gateway.

disabled.title: disabled
disabled.description: Whether the wallet is disabled. Wallets are disabled when no signing provider matches the party's namespace during sync. Disabled wallets use participant as the default signing provider.

reason.title: reason
reason.description: Reason for the wallet state, e.g., 'no signing provider matched'.

signingProviderIds.title: signingProviderIds
signingProviderIds.description: Filter wallets by signing provider IDs.

Session.title: Session
Session.description: Structure representing the connected network session

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the session.

accessToken.title: accessToken
accessToken.description: The access token for the session.

reason.title: reason
reason.description: The reason for the current status.

rights.title: rights
rights.description: The rights of the user for the network.

SigningProviderContext.title: SigningProviderContext
SigningProviderContext.description: Indicates that the wallet has been created in the database but hasn't yet been allocated by the participant.

partyId.title: partyId
partyId.description: The party ID corresponding to the wallet.

createdAt.title: createdAt
createdAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was created.

signedAt.title: signedAt
signedAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was signed.

preparedTransaction.title: preparedTransaction
preparedTransaction.description: The transaction data corresponding to the command ID.

preparedTransactionHash.title: preparedTransactionHash
preparedTransactionHash.description: The hash of the prepared transaction.

payload.title: payload
payload.description: Optional payload associated with the transaction.

origin.title: origin
origin.description: The origin (dApp URL) that initiated this transaction request.

externalTxId.title: externalTxId
externalTxId.description: External transaction ID from signing provider.

partyId.title: partyId
partyId.description: The party id of the wallet to be removed.

publicKey.title: publicKey
publicKey.description: The public key of the party.

createdAt.title: createdAt
createdAt.description: The timestamp when the message was created.

signedAt.title: signedAt
signedAt.description: The timestamp when the message was signed.

MessageId.title: MessageId
MessageId.description: The internal identifier of the pending message-signing request.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the API key.

id.title: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the API key.

name.title: name
name.description: The name of the API key.

createdAt.title: createdAt
createdAt.description: The timestamp when the API key was created.
